dialogos.texto_en: Ummm, I'm pretty sure\nit's supposed to be around here...\nStrange, where could it be?
What are you looking for?
...Ah, there it is! Look!
Futaro! Hurry up and come over here!\nI have something to show you.
You don't have to be in such a hurry,\nyou know? What exactly is it?
The Bell of Happiness!\nIt's one of the famous things at Ocean Tower,\nand if a couple rings it, they'll become happy.
Really...
(Another bell, huh. A typical tourist attraction.\n I remember seeing it at their grandpa's place too.)
It'll be nice if we could ring it together Futaro! Shall we?
Yeah.
Well then, let's ring it.\nThree, two, one...
...What a beautiful sound.
(I think it sounds normal...\n Well, it'll be uncouth to say otherwise.)
(It's easy to dismiss something like this as nonsense,\n but it doesn't matter if it's genuine or not\n when it comes to memories.)
Hey, Futaro.
There's a belief\nthat couples who ring this bell will\ncome back to Okinawa together again.
I wonder if we can come back here together.\nMaybe for our honeymoon...
Let's come back again.\nWell...maybe not for the honeymoon part.
That means just the two of us, right?
Well, um... If that's what you want,\nI'm okay with it.
Promise? It's a promise! Alrighty then!
There are people behind you, you know.
Soon, yeah?
Um... You mean...\nWe're coming back for the honeymoon?
Well, yeah, that's what I confessed to you.
...I get it.\nIt's a promise to always be together.
Heheh! I remember your confession Futaro. \nYou were so embarrassed.
You don't have to remember that...!
It's impossible to forget that,\nas it's my most precious memory.\nI can't forget it.
I want you to keep the memory. \nYou know, I was just so nervous at that time.
Futaro...
Thinking back to it,\nit's hard to bear the embarrassment, so please\nspare me from reliving it again...
There are people behind you, you know.
The bell at your grandpa's would be nice too.
Ah, our grandpa's?
There was something like that over there too, right?\nThat thing called the 'Bell of Vows.'
Come to think of it,\nit looks similar to the Bell of Happiness.
...Yeah, it might be nice to go there again.\nI want to tell my grandpa some things in person...\nand I have some unfinished business from that trip too.
Unfinished business?
Um, it's...a secret!
There are people behind you, you know.
Huh?\nOh, sorry, were you guys waiting in line too?
Well, yeah.\nThis bell can be rung not only by lovers,\nbut also by friends or family, apparently.
So, we decided to ring it together,\nwishing that we could always get along as sisters.
Wha?! Wait a minute!\nThen I'll ring it with you too!
Is it okay for one person to ring it multiple times?\nIt might reduce the benefit.
I-it's fine!\nIt's a different wish, so it's not a problem,\nI'm sure!
Teehee, that's right.\nShall we ring it together, the five of us?
Okay, let's do it!\nReady, and go!
